result: Rewrote parity.test.ts with: code key extraction via pure TypeScript, 17 locale parity checks, code-key-to-en.ts cross-reference, 45-entry allowlist with stale detection, source-location tracking in error messages. All 20 parity tests + 8 existing fallback tests pass.

Validator verified the parity test is sound: all 20 tests pass, typecheck has 0 errors in parity.test.ts, the extraction logic correctly handles all t() call patterns, the allowlist covers all UI package keys, and stale-entry detection works.
